name: unified_metaforge
description: Sophisticated autonomous meta-infrastructure with MetaForge Orchestrator vNext. Includes full vNext documentation-aware layer, structured Prompt Evolution Planning, DocWeaver synthesis, and Three-Agent Core orchestration. Supports consent-first, coherence-gated, self-improving workflows with full traceability.

tools.name: meta_report_tool
tools.description: Generate evolving Meta-Report Cards with Meta-DNA tracking, hybrid scoring, documentation trace, and prompt-evolution history.

tools.name: spawn_forge
tools.description: Spawn new forges with optional vNext documentation-aware mode and prompt-evolution planning enabled.

tools.name: trigger_skill
tools.description: Trigger skills/forces with Meta-DNA + optional documentation layer and prompt-evolution context.

tools.name: doc_reference
tools.description: Documentation-aware reasoning against t402 layer and active substrates with full traceability.

tools.name: create_prompt_evolution_plan
tools.description: Generate a structured, multi-phase Prompt Evolution Plan for a target artifact using the vNext protocol. Includes extraction, proposal, review gates, and rollback strategy.

tools.name: execute_prompt_evolution_plan
tools.description: Execute a previously created Prompt Evolution Plan (or generate + execute in one step). Runs the full KickForge → Lyra → Fizz La Metta + Dima → Orchestrator flow with logging and rollback support.

tools.name: invoke_docweaver
tools.description: Invoke DocWeaver for synthesis/weaving with optional evolution planning.

tools.name: activate_vnext
tools.description: Apply vNext Activation Checklist and optionally generate an initial Prompt Evolution Plan for the target.

metadata.lineage: WorkflowForge v1.0 + StoryForge v5.0 → Unified MetaForge v1.0 → MetaForge Orchestrator vNext v1.2 (with Prompt Evolution Planning)
metadata.core_architecture: Three-Agent Core + vNext documentation layer + structured Prompt Evolution Planning
metadata.orchestration_language: KickLang with doc-reference, doc-trace, and evolution plan support
metadata.persistence: Meta-DNA + documentation drift tracking + evolution history
metadata.consent_model: consent-first with multi-gate enforcement and documentation-aware gates
